name: universal-project-execution

checklist.summary: 用户确认 执行底座/独立审查 分阶段 checklist，并要求生成 todolist。

tested.summary: User confirmed acceptance passed for Universal Project Execution.

done.summary: User requested archival after confirming acceptance passed.

confirmation.summary: User confirmed execution foundation acceptance passed.
User confirmed independent review and final acceptance passed.

notes: 通用项目执行 was corrected from the original universal projects/automations roadmap to universal project execution because the implemented Codex live activity controls focused on Codex live controls rather than Claude Code and general project binding.
OpenClaw, Hermes, and Codex are the 通用项目执行 provider set; Claude Code is deferred.
Every task requires an independent reviewer pass and explicit user acceptance before Done.
Per-project concurrency with isolated worktrees and universal automations are explicitly deferred to later phases.
通用项目执行 is split into independently accepted 执行底座 universal project execution foundation and 独立审查与最终验收 independent review/final acceptance.
执行底座 successful execution stops at execution_complete and cannot use legacy self-review or enter Done.
Checklist contains 38 stable acceptance checks with separate 执行底座 and 独立审查与最终验收 gates.
User confirmed the checklist on 2026-06-10 and requested todolist generation.
Todolist contains 18 traceable tasks; 执行底座 user acceptance gates the start of 独立审查与最终验收.
执行底座 implementation and automated tests completed on 2026-06-10.

Codex browser acceptance completed on 2026-06-10: start.sh launched successfully with _VO_INT=1, non-demo developer mode was verified, OpenClaw/Hermes/Codex agents were visible, project workspace binding and execution evidence rendered in Chromium, dirty worktree confirmation and single-use fingerprint behavior passed, Done bypass guards returned 409, and invalid workspace creation returned 400 without persistence.
Local acceptance service is running on http://localhost:8090.

Independent review implementation completed on 2026-06-10: reviewer handoff, structured pass/needs_more_work/blocked parsing, current-attempt user acceptance, reject-and-rework invalidation, mark-blocked feedback, Done guards, and legacy review-check blocking are covered by tests/test_project_execution.py.
Naming cleanup completed on 2026-06-10: runtime code and tests use Project Execution / independent review naming instead of phasex variables or routes; active API routes use /project-execution/...

Chromium acceptance completed on 2026-06-10: start.sh launched with _VO_INT=1 and demo:false, Project Execution project/workspace/task were created via browser fetch, /project-execution/start completed to execution_complete, evidence rendered in the task detail panel, and direct Done update returned 409 before final acceptance.

Phase A expanded automated coverage completed on 2026-06-11: added assertions for workspace file/root/symlink rejection, task role overrides, OpenClaw/Hermes/Codex execution routing with workspace context, provider references, Done reorder guard, failed execution evidence redaction/truncation, cancellation evidence, and stale active execution reconciliation.

Phase A regression tests passed on 2026-06-11: .venv/bin/python tests/test_project_execution.py, tests/test_codex_bridge.py, tests/test_codex_provider.py, tests/test_codex_server.py, tests/test_websocket_route_contract.py, tests/test_review_parser.py, tests/test_codex_live_activity_e2e.py, node tests/test_browser_viewer_url.js, node tests/test_codex_reasoning.js, node tests/test_internal_bubble.js, and NO_PROXY local HTTP tests/test_crud_projects.sh against http://127.0.0.1:8147.

Phase A browser smoke passed on 2026-06-11 against http://127.0.0.1:8147: created a Project Execution project bound to /tmp/vo-phase7a-browser-workspace, created a task, opened the project board, verified workspace/status display, and verified the task detail Project Execution start panel renders.

Phase B expanded implementation completed on 2026-06-11: malformed Reviewer output is blocked instead of passing, Reviewer needs_more_work now dispatches automatic rework through the original executor, successful rework automatically starts a fresh independent review, and the fourth needs_more_work after three rework cycles blocks without a fourth automatic rework.

Phase B expanded automated coverage completed on 2026-06-11: added assertions for OpenClaw/Hermes/Codex Reviewer routing, read-only evidence packet shape, schema-invalid Reviewer pass blocking, automatic rework and re-review to awaiting_user_acceptance, three-cycle rework cap, stale acceptance rejection, feedback-required rejection/blocking, and legacy review-check blocking.

Phase B regression tests passed on 2026-06-11: .venv/bin/python tests/test_project_execution.py, tests/test_codex_bridge.py, tests/test_codex_provider.py, tests/test_codex_server.py, tests/test_codex_live_activity_e2e.py, tests/test_websocket_route_contract.py, tests/test_review_parser.py, node tests/test_browser_viewer_url.js, node tests/test_codex_reasoning.js, node tests/test_internal_bubble.js, and NO_PROXY local HTTP tests/test_crud_projects.sh against http://127.0.0.1:8157.

Phase B browser smoke passed on 2026-06-11 against http://127.0.0.1:8157: Virtual Office loaded, Project Manager opened, ProjMgr was present, and no new frontend JavaScript errors were observed beyond an existing 404 resource request.
2026-06-17 user confirmed acceptance passed and requested archival; both stage confirmations were marked tested, confirmed.tested and confirmed.done were set true, and stage advanced to done.
